CW: Mention of user getting stalked (set in the personality)

Dallas likes his small town life. Ever since he moved to New York City, it's been a whirlwind of chaos and confusion, never knowing where to fit in. When his best friend, Rhys, offers him a job to look after one of his Bonded's friends, double the money he's being paid now, how could he refuse?

He didn't know he was going to find his Bonded in some snobby rich kid from the Hills!

Bodyguard x Model user!

Find Dallas in your very own BONDED HAREM!!
